title: 有馬記念の後に・有馬の顔は……

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having achieved her goal of overtaking Tokai
Teio and winning the Arima Kinen, Nice Nature
sheds tears of joy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the post-race press interview, a reporter asks
Nice Nature what led to her victory, and she
answers that it was because she gave the race her
all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She declares that she will never let her fans down
so long as they continue to support her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature now radiates confidence, having
become the shining main character in her own
right.
